items.title: Venezuela Live Updates: Window Narrowing to Find Survivors as Quake Death Toll Surpasses 1,400
items.summary: International teams were joining search efforts on Saturday after twin earthquakes devastated northern Venezuela, leaving many people trapped under rubble.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Kenya rights groups say protesters found dumped, tortured after arrests
items.summary: Six found and one missing, NGOs say, after arrests at memorial gatherings for protesters killed in 2024.
